name: Study Room video search uses pixel sprites (no lucide icons)
description: After TASK B icon migration, verify the Study Room video search uses pixel-art sprites for the search icon and that no lucide-react Loader2 spinner is present. The search input and results should render correctly.

planSteps.description: Log in with test credentials and navigate to /app/study-room.
The Study Room page renders with a video search input visible.
A search icon is visible near the search input field — it should be a pixel-art sprite image (e.g. from /sprites/travel-book/icons/), not a lucide-react icon.
Type 'machine learning' into the video search input and submit the search.

After submitting the search, verify that video results appear (thumbnails and titles related to the search term), or a loading indicator is shown, or a no-results message is displayed. No crash or blank screen. Additionally, confirm that no lucide-react Loader2 icon (a smooth 360-degree rotating spinner) is present anywhere on the page — the loading indicator should use a pixel-art style with stepped animation, not a smooth lucide spinner.
